LEGAL

PRIVACY POLICY

Home/Privacy

Last updated: March 2026

Asiatic Engineers (“we”, “us”) respects your privacy. This policy describes how we handle information when you use www.wastewaterevaporation.com and related contact channels.

Information we collect

We may collect information you voluntarily provide, such as your name, company, phone number, email address, and message content when you email us or use our contact form. We may also collect standard technical data from your browser (such as IP address, browser type, and pages visited) through normal server logs or analytics if enabled.

Cookies

Our site may use cookies or similar technologies for basic functionality or analytics. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

Contact form data

If you submit the contact form, your submission is processed to respond to your enquiry. Where a third-party form provider (e.g. Formspree) is used, their privacy terms also apply to transmission of that data.

Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share information with service providers strictly as needed to operate the website or comply with law.

Your rights & contact

To request access, correction, or deletion of personal data, contact water@wastewaterevaporation.com.
